member.name: M:GTA.ShapeTest.StartTestMouseCursorLOSProbe(GTA.Math.Vector3@,GTA.Math.Vector3@,GTA.IntersectFlags,GTA.Entity,GTA.ShapeTestOptions)
member.summary:
Start a line-of-sight world probe shape test between 2 points calculated based on the mouse cursor position. Works just like
only the start and end points of the probe are calculated based on the mouse cursor position projected into the world.
member.param: The returned start position of the probe in world space.
The returned end position of the probe in world space.
What type of objects the shape test should intersect with.

Specify an
that the shape test should exclude, leave null for no entities ignored.
Specify options for the spape test.
member.value:
The shape test handle. If this method fails to create the shape test request because there are too many ongoing requests,
will return
on the handle struct.
